final:
module top_module(
        input  [31:0]in,
        output [31:0]out
    );assign out = {in[29:0], 2'b0};

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= in; // Misleading assignment to output
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: out <= in; // Misleading assignment to output
